description: Style NoteLend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief sandals. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear.Product DetailsRound toed black leather sandals with a Velcro fastening loop around the ankle Leather upper with overlays at the toe box and midfoot region, cut out details on the sides in the midfoot and forefoot region Slightly padded curved footbed Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
